label: yes
cot_prefix: Okay, let's tackle this question. The user wants to know how the author introduces the topic, and the options are A through D. The passage starts with a series of questions like "Do you start your work by making a list..." and "Do you always take a list with you..." So right away, the author is asking the reader questions to engage them. The next part of the text lists reasons why making a to-do list is good, which are the benefits. But the question is specifically about how the topic is introduced. So the first few sentences are all questions, so that's option A. The other options: B is presenting facts, but the author isn't stating facts yet, just questions. C is the author's point of view, but
